positive: Retro 1950s diner aesthetic illustration. A stylized illustration of a chrome jukebox, red vinyl booths, and a milkshake glass, rendered in a bold, pop-art, limited color palette of turquoise, cherry red, and mustard yellow. Mid-century modern graphic design.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grunge, realism, messy lines
